//: VaultMTG SPA stylelint config — added #309 Pass B. Scope is deliberately NARROW: this lints ONLY for raw hex colors (the design-token migration), not the full stylelint-config-standard ruleset — CSS was previously unlinted, and adopting the whole standard config would surface hundreds of unrelated convention errors. The color-no-hex rule is the lint-layer mirror of src/test/noRawHex.test.ts: components must use design-system tokens (--vault-* primitives + the canonical semantic layer), not raw hex. It is intentionally WARN-FIRST (severity: warning) per Ray's APPROVE-WITH-CHANGES ruling #3 — a hard-fail would block in-flight branches. Follow-up #340 flips it to hard-fail once the tree stays clean. The vitest guard (noRawHex.test.ts) is the executable enforcement now.
//ignoreFiles: src/index.css is the single token-definition file — the one place raw hex is allowed (it defines the --vault-* primitives the rest of the app references), so it is excluded from this lint entirely.
